niche: wood-fired pizza and taco pop-up catering

pattern.imageEvidence: outdoor live-fire catering station with wood oven, prep table, finished pizza, tacos, toppings, and crew visible
pattern.styleContract: Warm and lively with guest-count proof, an outdoor live-fire catering station, tomato, cilantro-teal, and masa-yellow action accents, and a readable menu ticket as the signature move.

hero.title: Ember & Masa live-fire catering hero image
hero.alt: Two caterers preparing wood-fired pizza and tacos at an outdoor event station with oven, tortillas, and toppings.

contact.serviceArea: Live-fire pizza, taco pop-ups, backyard parties, rehearsal dinners, office lunches, graduation nights, and neighborhood events across the central metro

copy.eyebrow: Pizza, tacos, and a tidy live-fire setup
copy.heroTitle: Feed the party from the flame and the comal.
copy.heroText: Ember & Masa brings wood-fired pies, taco boards, prep tables, and a calm crew so your party gets the theater without the kitchen panic.
copy.introTitle: A menu board that respects guest count, timing, and setup space.
copy.introText: We match the menu to guest count, dietary notes, prep footprint, service window, and whether your crowd leans pizza, tacos, or both.
copy.proofTitle: Host proof before the first slice
copy.quoteText: Compare packages with date, location, guest count, power or outdoor access, and the kind of spread you want. We will reply with a menu path and setup notes.

services.title: Pizza And Taco Pop-Up
services.text: A flexible spread with wood-fired pizzas, tortilla rounds, salsas, toppings, and crew-paced service for mingling guests.

services.title: Pizza-First Party
services.text: Signature pies, seasonal add-ons, salad boards, and a service rhythm that keeps the oven moving without a buffet traffic jam.

services.title: Taco Table Night
services.text: Proteins or vegetables, tortillas, salsas, garnishes, and setup notes for yards, courtyards, offices, and casual receptions.

process.title: Share the event shape
process.text: Guest count, location, date, timing, and food preferences help us pick a realistic service lane.

process.title: Confirm the footprint
process.text: We check prep space, access, weather plan, and whether the service is buffet, station, or paced rounds.

process.title: Serve and reset cleanly
process.text: The crew cooks, replenishes, keeps the station tidy, and leaves with a simple host handoff.

proof.label: pizza, tacos, or a mixed spread

notes: Works: masa-yellow action accents, and a readable menu ticket. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: outdoor live-fire catering station with wood oven, prep table, finished pizza, tacos, toppings, and crew visible. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Feed my event is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Feed my event, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: outdoor live-fire catering station with wood oven, prep table, finished pizza, tacos, toppings, and crew visible.
brandBrief.signatureMove: masa-yellow action accents, and a readable menu ticket.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic package-menu-board recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.whatToSend: Share the event date, venue or address, guest count, setup window, power/water rules, and the package style you are considering.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Guest count, location, date, timing, and food preferences help us pick a realistic service lane.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Date-window flow for Live-fire pizza, taco pop-ups, backyard parties, rehearsal dinners, office lunches, graduation nights, and neighborhood events across the central metro: date fit, setup rules, guest flow, and hold status come before package pressure.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For wood-fired pizza and taco pop-up catering, guest count, menu pace, service footprint, prep access, and cleanup timing are matched before the package is recommended.
